name: baishou-next
description: 白守 Next — 以纯白誓约，守护彼此一生。

scripts.dev:mobile: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "日常开发：启动 Metro（只改 JS/TS；手机须已装开发版 APK）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile dev
scripts.dev:mobile:clear: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "全量重装：清 Metro/Gradle 缓存并重编安装开发版 APK（包名 com.baishou.baishou.dev，与正式版并存）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile dev:clear
scripts.mobile:fix: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "将 Expo 相关依赖对齐到当前 SDK（改 package.json 后建议执行）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile fix
scripts.mobile:export: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "导出 Android 离线包到 apps/mobile/dist。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile export:android
scripts.mobile:connect: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "USB 连接手机：adb reverse 并打开开发版（需另一终端已运行 pnpm dev:mobile）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile connect
scripts.mobile:install: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "安装已编好的 debug APK（dev:mobile:clear 编完但手机没点安装时用）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile install:apk
scripts.mobile:setup: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "首次克隆或升级 Expo 后：install → fix 依赖 → dev:mobile:clear 全量重装。" pnpm install && pnpm mobile:fix && pnpm dev:mobile:clear
scripts.release:desktop:linux: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "自行编译 Linux AppImage（非官方发版，输出 apps/desktop/dist）。" pnpm sync:app-version && pnpm --filter @baishou/desktop build:linux
scripts.release:desktop:win: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "构建 Windows Inno Setup 安装包（输出 apps/desktop/dist）。" pnpm sync:app-version && pnpm --filter @baishou/desktop build:win
scripts.release:all: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "官方正式打包 Android + Windows（产物见 release/ 与 apps/desktop/dist）。" node scripts/release-all.mjs
